title: Building and Training a Model with keras.Sequential
short_description: Build a regression MLP with keras.Sequential, configure training with compile (MSE + SGD), and train it with fit. The Keras counterpart to the PyTorch Sequential challenge.
learning_objectives: Compose a network from a list of layers with keras.Sequential
Use Dense layers and set activations
Train with model.fit and read the loss history
Contrast Keras compile/fit with a hand-written PyTorch loop
